description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pytest that runs on push to master and dev-gha branches and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12) and optional extras (diagrams, mypy). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements.txt and requirements_test.txt, optionally install additional dependencies for diagrams or mypy, run pytest with coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codecov.
